live_store_metadata.short_description: 100+ prank sounds with taser zaps and buzzing clippers.

full_description_digest.one_sentence_summary: A fast and responsive prank soundboard with 18 categories highlighting realistic hair clipper buzzes, electric taser zaps, gun sound simulators, and trending memes.
main_feature_claims: Vivid, easy-to-scan icons for quick find and play
One-tap, low-delay playback for sharp timing
Favorites and custom lists for rapid-fire combos
Meme board with trending audio and viral sounds
Realistic hair clipper and razor buzz for haircut pranks
Crisp crackling electric taser stun gun simulator
Diverse gun sound simulator featuring multiple firearms
Big, brash blasts for an air horn prank
A library of comic pops and squeaks for fart gags
how_to_use_flow: Pick a category from the dashboard
Tap an icon to play the sound instantly
Save favorites and arrange custom lists for smooth, rapid-fire pranks

corrected_positioning.primary_positioning: Fast and responsive prank soundboard featuring buzzing hair clippers, crackling tasers, loud gun simulators, and trending memes.
secondary_positioning: Light-hearted simulator soundboard for friendly jokes and social settings
Quick-access sound effect board for content creators needing audio cues
not_the_right_positioning: Not a voice changer or voice modifier app
Not an audio recorder or full editor tool
Not a real clipper, razor, or stun gun weapon utility
Not a broad social networking platform
strongest_differentiators: Broad variety of 18 distinct sound categories
Optimized one-tap, low-delay playback for perfect timing
Robust gun sound simulator with realistic gunshot effects integrated inside the soundboard
Integration of electric stun gun zaps and trending memes alongside classic barber clippers

core_user_jobs: I want to surprise/prank my friends with clipper or taser sounds
I want a fast soundboard app for parties and gatherings
I want realistic hair trimmer buzzes to fake a haircut
I want realistic gun sounds and weapon firing effects
I want quick-play audio buttons for reaction clips or memes
likely_audience: Gen Z and young casual mobile users
Social media content creators and streamers
Users looking for quick jokes, icebreakers, and casual fun
conversion_hooks: Crackling electric taser stun gun visual and sound effect
Realistic gun sound simulator with gunshots
Meme board with viral trending sounds
One-tap rapid play with zero delay

avoid_or_use_carefully.note: Avoid implying the app acts as a real weapon or protection tool; restrict to simulator/prank contexts.
Make sure to pair with 'prank' or 'simulator' to set proper expectations.

recommended_competitor_types.description: Apps focusing on haircut pranks, air horns, fart noises, and electric stun gun effects.
Barber clipper trimmer simulators or dedicated electric taser prank games.

suggested_competitors.title: Prank - Funny Sounds,Simulator
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Combines prop noises like electric razors, toy guns, taser simulations, fart sounds, and voice changer tools.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Prank Everything! Tons of Crazy Sounds, Voice Changer & AI Face Dance !
suggested_competitors.desc200: Unleash your inner prankster with our revolutionary sound effects app! Packed with realistic prop noises like toy guns, laser blasters, electric razors, and more, this app is designed for endless entertainment.

suggested_competitors.title: Haircut Prank: Taser & Fart
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Direct mapping of core haircut, taser, air horn, and fart categories. Highly optimized soundboard interface.
suggested_competitors.short_description: 100+ prank sounds with haircut prank, fart sounds & taser soundboard!
suggested_competitors.desc200: 😂 Haircut Prank: Taser & Fart is a fun prank sounds app packed with realistic haircut prank sounds, shocking taser sound effects, hilarious fart sounds, and loud air horn prank sounds in one power.

suggested_competitors.title: Funny Prank Sounds: Fart, Horn
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Features air horns, fart sounds, haircut clippers, and various other funny prank sounds for quick jokes.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Prank your friends with Air Horn, Fart and other funny sounds.
suggested_competitors.desc200: Tired of boring sound effect apps? Look no further than funny prank sounds offline App! If you want a prank your friends, try to add funny sound effects to your mobile. You can find a wide range of funny sounds.

suggested_competitors.title: Haha Prank - Funny Prank Sound
suggested_competitors.why_relevant: Combines classic fart, haircut, air horn, and taser soundboards. Features simple one-tap controls and loops.
suggested_competitors.short_description: Troll friend with funny prank sound like: fart, haircut, air horn or scary sound
suggested_competitors.desc200: Make every moment more fun with Haha Prank Sound 🎉 Prank Sounds app is a fun and entertaining application designed to provide users with a wide range of amusing and realistic sound effects. Tap once to play.

content_direction.recommended_store_message: Turn your phone into a funny prank soundboard! Try realistic haircut razor clippers, shocking stun gun zaps, loud gun sound simulators, and trending memes.
recommended_screenshot_angles: Realistic electric shock stun gun simulator
recommended_localization_notes: Ensure terms like 'hair clipper', 'razor', and 'haircut' are translated to local variations of barber/clipper/hair trimmer.
Translate 'taser' or 'stun gun' to local words describing electric shockers (e.g. 'súng phóng điện', 'chích điện' in Vietnamese).
Translate 'gun sounds' or 'gun simulator' to local variations describing guns (e.g. 'âm thanh súng', 'mô phỏng súng' in Vietnamese).

best_for: Competitor keyword overlay and score boosting
Barber clipper, gun sound simulator, and electric stun gun semantic cluster research
pipeline_usage_notes.recommended_next_step: Deploy the config file and run ASO Keyword Filter orchestrator to extract high-performing clean keywords.
